# Project (alt-harness fixture)

A repo that is well-harnessed using mainstream conventions, NOT this skill's own
filenames. Used to prove the recognizer credits real mechanisms.

## Working rules
- One feature at a time; keep changes in scope.
- Definition of done: `make test` and `make lint` pass.

## End of session
Leave the repo restartable: `make check` green, specs updated.
